message:
fix(channel): distinguish crash evidence actions by actual controller state

CrashSender previously always emitted "crash_after_sends" or
"crash_probabilistic" evidence regardless of whether the controller
actually transitioned to crashed state (it may already have been
crashed). Now captures the bool return from controller.crash() and
emits "send_rejected_crashed" when the channel was already in a
crashed state, giving more accurate forensic evidence for debugging
crash injection scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
